quality.rationale: 弱场近似下黎曼张量一阶展开推导结合规范对称性验证，逻辑链条完整且具明确物理应用背景

origin.question:
Problem 13.13. Show that in linearized theory the components of the Riemann tensor are$$\mathsf {R}_{\alpha \mu  eta 
u} =  rac {1}{2} \left(\mathsf {h}_{\alpha 
u , \mu  eta} + \mathsf {h}_{\mu  eta , 
u \alpha} - \mathsf {h}_{\mu 
u , \alpha  eta} - \mathsf {h}_{\alpha  eta , \mu 
u}ight) .$$Also show explicitly that this Riemann tensor is invariant under a gauge transformation.
origin.answer:
$R_{\alpha \mu  eta 
u} =  rac{1}{2} (h_{\alpha 
u , \mu  eta} + h_{\mu  eta , 
u \alpha} - h_{\mu 
u , \alpha  eta} - h_{\alpha  eta , \mu 
u})$; 规范变换下形式保持不变
origin.solution:
Solution 13.13. Since the Christoffel symbols $\Gamma_{a\mu  eta} =  rac{1}{2} (\mathtt{h}_{a eta ,\mu} + \mathtt{h}_{a\mu , eta} - \mathtt{h}_{ eta \mu ,a})$ are of order $h$ we may ignore the terms that are products of the $\Gamma$ 's in the formula relating the Riemann components to the $\Gamma$ 's, thus we are left with$$ egin{array}{l} \mathrm {R}_{\alpha \mu  eta 
u} \approx \mathrm {g}_{\alpha \lambda} \left(\Gamma_{\mu 
u ,  eta}^{\lambda} - \Gamma_{\mu  eta , 
u}^{\lambda}ight) \approx 2 \Gamma_{\alpha \mu [ 
u ,  eta ]} \ = \left(\mathrm {h}_{\alpha [ 
u ,  eta ], \mu} - \mathrm {h}_{\mu [ 
u ,  eta ], \alpha}ight) \ \end{array}$$and the formula is verified.Under a gauge transformation $\mathrm{h}_{\mu 
u} ightarrow \mathrm{h}_{\mu 
u} - 2\xi_{(\mu, 
u)}$ and$$\mathsf {R}_{a \mu  eta 
u} 	o \mathsf {R}_{a \mu  eta 
u} - \xi_{a [, 
u ,  eta ], \mu} + \xi_{\mu [, 
u ,  eta ], a} - \xi_{
u [, a,  eta ], \mu} + \xi_{
u [, \mu ,  eta ], a}.$$Since partial derivatives commute the added terms cancel and the form of the Riemann tensor is unchanged.
